# custom_business_partner_company_group (Resource)

Create or update the Company Group in the Business Partner application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "custom_business_partner_company_group" "main" {
  display_id = "100000001"
  subdomain  = "porrag-dev"
  tenant_id  = "c60856b8-5209-483e-92b4-3b52f704e3c2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_id` (String) Human-readable identifier for the Company Group
- `subdomain` (String) Subdomain
- `tenant_id` (String) Globally-unique identifier of the BTP subaccount

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Globally-unique identifier from the database

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# terraform import btp_directory.<resource_name> <display_id>,<subdomain>,<tenant_id>

terraform import custom_business_partner_company_group.main 100000001,porrag-dev,338a52cd-89d6-4daf-8574-daa040bfb700

# terraform import using id attribute in import block

import {
  to = custom_business_partner_company_group.<resource_name>
  id = "<display_id>,<subdomain>,<tenant_id>"
}

import {
  to = custom_business_partner_company_group.<resource_name>
  identity = {
    directory_id = "<display_id>,<subdomain>,<tenant_id>"
  }
}
```
